name: Grilled Flounder with Lime, Lemon and Cucumber Noodles (Gc)
recipeIngredient: 10 cucumbers, peeled, seeded, and cut into noodles
2 limes, zest peeled, and sliced paper thin (reserve juice)
2 lemons, zest peeled, and sliced paper thin (reserve juice)
2 red bell peppers, seeded, and sliced paper thin
salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse lemon and lime zest under hot water for 2 minutes.
2. Toss cucumber, citrus zest, and bell peppers in kosher salt; let sit for 30 minutes.
3. Rinse and drain well.
4. Season flounder with salt and pepper.
5. Grill flounder on the first side for 5 minutes.
6. Turn flounder very carefully and grill for an additional 3 minutes.
7. Baste with lemon and lime juice.
8. Filet flounder and arrange on top of cucumber noodles.
9. Drizzle with lemon and lime juice to taste.
